---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for WandR
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
<!-- What problem would this feature solve? e.g. "I always want to explore coffee shops but WandR doesn't..." -->

## 🗺️ How Would It Work?
<!-- How do you envision this feature working in the app? -->

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? -->

## 📸 Mockups or Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples from other apps -->

## 🎚️ Priority
- [ ] Critical - Can't use the app without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Just an idea

## 👥 Would This Help Others?
<!-- Why do you think other WandR users would benefit from this? -->

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context or information -->
